space_id.description: Pipeliner space (account) id; sent as the /spaces/{space_id}/entities/... path segment.

username.description: Pipeliner API username, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username. Never logged.

password.description: Pipeliner API password, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Pipeliner API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
